title: Don't Require Color for Groups, Status, etc. - Allow Black Only and custom colors
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: JennaK (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I find all of the color distracting and it makes it harder to look at visually when you have boards/projects with several groups, or are using a column like status, for example, as a custom way to tag/categorize information.

I would love to have the option to use significantly less color so that we can use color to highlight things in a more meaningful way. I think allowing custom colors or a wider variety of colors could also be great to align the spaces with brand standards.

What are you trying to achieve

A less overwhelming view. Using color more intentionally to draw the attention to what we decide to instead of being forced to assign an arbitrary color to things that don’t need it.
